title: AI Coding and Data Agents for Researchers
description: A curated, privacy-first decision-support catalog of AI coding and data-analysis tools for researchers, including deployment, data-handling, and data-sensitivity suitability information.

affiliation.name: Institute of Molecular Genetics of the Czech Academy of Sciences

Third-party vendor materials, external software, services, logos, and trademarks remain under their own terms. IMG CAS is the curator's affiliation, not the publisher or an endorsement.
provenance: Curated from current first-party vendor documentation, privacy and trust material, pricing pages, and official repositories; generated from the canonical JSON source with a deterministic local build. Privacy classifications remain decision support, not legal advice.
evidence_statement: Catalog version 2.0.1 modified 2026-07-14; all 43 records carry an explicit 2026-07-13 evidence-check date, with provisional or conditional claims labelled conservatively.
